title: Aitareya Aranyaka: Forest Wisdom
description: Aitareya Aranyaka — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.
introduction: Aitareya Aranyaka — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.

translation.text: The Self is the priest, the Self is the offering, the Self is the fire. Whoever offers thus, knowing this, his offering is accepted. He attains all worlds. He becomes immortal.
